Cache

Cloudflare-CDN-Cache-Control

Tests the Cloudflare-specific edge cache TTL header, separate from the browser's Cache-Control.

Cache headers

…
Look at cf-cache-status (HIT/MISS/DYNAMIC) and the TTL headers.
